summary: Phase A Part 2 - Client MiniPortal & 2nd Admin Approval: All 11 backend tests passed, frontend UI verified for MiniPortal at payment_received and documents_submitted stages
feature: Client MiniPortal for pre-assessment clients, client self-submit-for-review, admin 2nd approval (case creation)

backend_endpoints_tested: POST /api/pre-assess-portal/client/submit/{pa_id} - client self-submit for review (requires client role, at least 1 doc, stage=payment_received)
POST /api/pre-assess-portal/client/accept-proposal/{pa_id} - client accepts proposal at stage=proposal_sent
POST /api/pre-assess-portal/client/mock-pay-proposal/{pa_id} - client mock-pays main fee, stage → proposal_paid
POST /api/pre-assess-portal/admin/approve-final/{pa_id} - admin-only, creates case record, stage → case_created
POST /api/pre-assess-portal/generate-public-link - partner generates public link for PA
frontend_components_tested: 6-step pipeline progress (Payment Done → Upload Documents → Under Review → Approved → Proposal & Signing → Case Active)
Upload Your Documents card with document-type selector (data-testid='mini-doc-type') and upload input (data-testid='mini-upload-input')
Submit for Review button (data-testid='mini-submit-review') - disabled until docs uploaded
Under Review amber card at documents_submitted/under_review stages
Mini sidebar navigation (My Pre-Assessment, Tools > AI Document Scanner, Messages, Support Tickets, My Profile)
Copy Public Link button (data-testid='copy-link-{pa_id}') in Partner Pipeline for new/payment_pending stages
test_coverage.e2e_flow_tested: Partner create PA → generate-public-link → client mock-pay → magic-login → upload document → client self-submit → partner submit-documents → admin review approve → partner send-proposal → client accept-proposal → client mock-pay-proposal → admin approve-final → case_created + cases row verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Part 2 fully tested. MiniPortal shows correct UI for each stage: payment_received shows upload UI + Submit button, documents_submitted/under_review shows Under Review amber card. E2E flow from PA creation to case creation works. Copy Public Link button visible for new/payment_pending stage PAs in Partner Pipeline.
